revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.
=== Sources ===
Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Material that is '''challenged or likely to be challenged''' needs a reliable source, which should be cited in the article." The main articles and set of related citations for this template's content are listed in this template itself. Questions about the reliability or accuracy of this template's concepts should be addressed on those articles' talk pages. Questions about this template's organization should be addressed on this template's [[Template talk:{{PAGENAME}}|talk page]]. === See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here: --> [[Category:Buddhism templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.
=== Sources ===
Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Material that is '''challenged or likely to be challenged''' needs a reliable source, which should be cited in the article." The main articles and set of related citations for this template's content are listed in this template itself. '''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.
=== Sources ===
Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.

Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.
=== Sources ===
Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Material that is '''challenged or likely to be challenged''' needs a reliable source, which should be cited in the article." The main articles and set of related citations for this template's content are listed in this template itself. revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.

Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Material that is '''challenged or likely to be challenged''' needs a reliable source, which should be cited in the article." revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.

Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BuddhasHolySites%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BuddhasHolySites%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === '''Template:BuddhasHolySites''' categorizes major Wikipedia articles on the places where Buddha lived.
'''Other sites''' refers to sites other than the above 8 main sites (4 + 4).
Also, important historical Buddhist sites in India from later times (when the Buddha passed away already) can be included at the bottom of the article, under the heading '''later sites'''.
=== Sources ===
Wikipedia's [[WP:V#Burden of evidence|policy on verifiability]] states: :"The burden of evidence lies with the editor who adds or restores material. Material that is '''challenged or likely to be challenged''' needs a reliable source, which should be cited in the article." The main articles and set of related citations for this template's content are listed in this template itself. Questions about the reliability or accuracy of this template's concepts should be addressed on those articles' talk pages. Questions about this template's organization should be addressed on this template's [[Template talk:{{PAGENAME}}|talk page]]. === See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here: --> }}</includeonly>
